insight: Cholera-like signal rising in Kasese, Bundibugyo and Kampala. Recommend WASH investigation and case verification within 24 hours.
Malaria RDT and ACT stock pressure detected in Yumbe, Kiryandongo and Isingiro; projected shortage within 7-14 days if consumption continues.
Karamoja districts show low DPT3/measles coverage and simultaneous measles alerts. Recommend targeted outreach micro-plan.
High occupancy at RRH-level facilities in Kampala, Mbarara and Gulu suggests need for referral redistribution and bed status coordination.
